# testproj — Master Project Plan

> **Project:** testproj
> **Owner:** Test Owner
> **Started:** 2026-01-01

---

## Product Vision

testproj is a fixture project used only by the CLI's byte-identical output test harness.

**Tech Stack:** Node.js

| 1.2 | CI pipeline | Basic build check |
